seoTitle: Tuart Hill vs Turkey Hill — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Tuart Hill and Turkey Hill. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Tuart Hill vs Turkey Hill: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Tuart Hill and Turkey Hill.
heading: Tuart Hill vs Turkey Hill — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Tuart Hill, Western Australia and Turkey Hill, Western Australia. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Turkey Hill has a lower overall climate risk score (28/100) compared to Tuart Hill (39/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Tuart Hill or Turkey Hill safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Tuart Hill has a flood risk score of 45/100, while Turkey Hill scores 25/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Tuart Hill scores 16/100 for bushfire risk. Turkey Hill scores 23/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Tuart Hill or Turkey Hill?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Turkey Hill has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.33% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
